title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Go CLI and server that bundles, runs, and serves 70+ open-source LLMs locally with a single command.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for the Ollama server; works in Node, Deno, Bun and browsers.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library providing synchronous and asynchronous APIs to chat, generate embeddings, pull models, etc.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration that exposes Ollama models as standard LangChain LLMs and embedders.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI (formerly Ollama-WebUI) for chatting, model management, RAG, multimodal vision and admin controls.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Android compatibility and fluent builder API.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API for chat, completion and embeddings.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Convenient Node CLI for pulling, listing, deleting and chatting with Ollama models from the terminal.

title: ollama-cookbook
summary: Community recipes showing how to run Ollama with Docker, Kubernetes, GPU acceleration, RAG, function-calling, etc.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama server and models on Kubernetes with GPU and persistent storage support.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker images (CPU & GPU) and compose snippets for running Ollama server containerized.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-litellm-proxy
summary: Use LiteLLM proxy to expose Ollama models behind an OpenAI-compatible endpoint with load-balancing and fallbacks.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate offering async/await bindings for chat, completion and embeddings APIs.

title: ollama-chat-telegram
summary: Self-hosted Telegram bot that lets groups chat with any Ollama model through a simple /chat command.

title: ollama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that adds a chat sidebar and slash commands using local Ollama models.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node enabling no-code workflows to prompt Ollama models for text generation or embeddings.

title: ollama-rag-langchain-streamlit
summary: Minimal RAG demo that ingests PDFs into Chroma and answers questions with Ollama + LangChain + Streamlit UI.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package: JavaScript/TypeScript client downloaded 100k+ times for talking to Ollama.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package on PyPI providing sync & async APIs for chat, generate, embed, pull, list, delete.
